title: Frozen per-weaver required inspected_source_counts inventory-id table (D24/D26/D31)
why: The five weavers' required inventory ids are frozen so the ledger's inspected_source_counts schema cannot silently drift; the SAME table is enforced by clotho/thread-ledger.mjs's coverage validator and by clotho/inventory.mjs, proven equal by a unit.
non_claim: Count cardinalities and committed-inventory equality are the Task 5 driver's job, not this table.
change_rule: Changing the table requires a plan amendment, TELOS re-authorization, and updated equality units.
